creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
summary of changes:
  1 update to 3.7.9 from 3.7.3
  2 change MASTER_SITES, now can download the source code correctly

Fix: 

PORTNAME=      ilias
-PORTVERSION=   3.7.3
+PORTVERSION=   3.7.9
 PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    www
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.ilias.de/download/src/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://superb-west.dl.sourceforge.net/sourceforge/ilias/

 MAINTAINER=    r@robakdesign.com
 COMMENT=       A poweful, dynamic, PHP and MySQL based e-learning platform--rhfmfoVm2VQjUrfayhotWCi8pwVNLqqvS4khvIpAs2eokUNz
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/ports/www/ilias/Makefile       2007-05-19 20:25:02.000000000 +0000
+++ Makefile    2008-02-27 15:11:06.000000000 +0000
@@ -5,10 +5,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/www/ilias/Makefile,v 1.2 2007/05/19 20:25:02 flz Exp $
